subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest a servant from among Thy servants who hath gone forth from his dwelling, turning toward Thy countenance and advancing unto the ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری عبدا من عبادک خرج من بیته متوجها الی وجهک و اقبل الی بحر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for pilgrims, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
